symptoms.symptom_name: Honey-coloured adherent crusts on erythematous base, spreading contiguously

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Honey-coloured crusting is the classic sign of impetigo.
Honey crusts and contiguous spread argue against grouped-vesicle HSV / monomorphic eczema herpeticum.
Regional nodes indicate a bacterial process rather than contact dermatitis.

symptoms.symptom_name: No deep hot spreading painful erythema / no fever

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of deep tender spreading erythema and systemic features argues strongly against cellulitis.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Only if refractory, recurrent, or resistance suspected — do not delay empiric treatment.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urinalysis at 1–3 weeks if dark urine
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Not routine; only if PSGN features (dark urine, oedema) develop.
